steps.title: Identify what the underlined portion describes
steps.content: The underlined portion describes Douglas Turner Ward's professional background—his roles as an actor, director, and playwright.

steps.title: Apply to the choices
steps.content: D correctly identifies this: “provides additional information about a person discussed in the text.” A, B, and C each claim something else entirely—that it illustrates organizational importance, compares achievements, or argues against earlier text. This matches choice D — D is correct.
